markets.title: Will NYC record at least 1 inch of rain by September 30, 2026?
markets.subtitle: YES if official Central Park rainfall reaches at least 1 inch.
markets.rules_primary: This market resolves to Yes if the official National Weather Service Central Park station reports cumulative rainfall greater than or equal to 1 inch for September 2026 by 11:59 PM ET on September 30, 2026.
markets.rules_secondary: The final settlement source is the National Weather Service. Kalshi is the settlement authority.
